---
title: "Laboratorio di Chimica Agraria (S13)"
---

::: {style="font-size:18px;"}

___"Mai dire Mais"___ [semi cit.]

:::

::: {.callout-note}
**Responsabile Laboratorio**:

- Prof. Zeno Varanini - [email](mailto:zeno.varanini@univr.it)
- Prof.sa Anita Zamboni - [email](mailto:anita.zamboni@univr.it)

<!-- **Laboratory Technician**: Fabio Valentinuzzi - [email](mailto:fabio.valentinuzzi@unibz.it) [phone](tel:+39 0471017627)  -->

Per qualsiasi aggiornamento o info, scrivimi! --> [Mauro](mailto:mauro.maver@unibz.it?subject=[Update]%20Storage%20K-1%20and%20Lab%201.20)

:::

::: {.callout-important}
Call [112](tel:112) in case of Emergency
:::

Last update: 25 / 12 / 2025

------------------------------------------------------------------------

#### Last changes:

- 10/01/2023 - List updated - **Mauro**
- 22/11/2022 - List updated - **Mauro**

------------------------------------------------------------------------


::: {style="font-size:20px;"}
